metadata.name: Friction Condition Library
metadata.description: Combination-dependent friction data (coating + lubricant + assembly-condition pairing). Faz 2.6.2A infrastructure shell only -- no record has been populated yet. See docs/adr/ADR-0010-coating-lubrication-friction-data-ownership.md and docs/phases/PHASE_2.6.2A_COATING_FRICTION_DATA_OWNERSHIP.md for the migration plan and Faz 2.6.2B acceptance criteria that gate population.
